entry.title: Re: G/L account generated during WIP calculation in HANA...
entry.content:
Hello

Sorry for the late response.

There will not be chance to have both WIP and Reserve.

Because either debit>credit, or credit > debit, not both.

Best Regards,
Owen

entry.title: Re: How to Create a Welcome Popup in Fiori Launchpad (BAS)
entry.content: https://community.sap.com/t5/welcome-corner-blog-posts/asking-good-questions-in-the-scn-discussion-spaces-will-help-you-get-good/ba-p/12880734

entry.title: Deactivation of 2 sets of books
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Are you able to advise if would be possible to deactivate set of books. We can see how to do it in the system but cannot see any dates of when the deactivation will occur.

Other queries which need to be answered are:

- We assume all prior data will remain in place.
- What happens to any master data that has the different sets of books like in fixed assets that have valuation values per set of books
- Also Cost rate master data that has rates for each set of books.
- Also services master data that has rates for each set of books.
- Can we hide the non active sets of books?

Thanks

PERSON_NAME


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Deactivation of 2 sets of books
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

Thank you for your queries regarding the deactivation of sets of books. Please find below clarifications to each of your points.

 

  1. Go to Business configuration view
  2. Go to Overview
  3. Search and open activity Set of Books
  4. Select the Set of Books and click on Edit
  5. Go to Company Settings tab
  6. Click on Deactivate

 

Yes, it is technically possible to deactivate sets of books via the Business Configuration work center. However:

  • The system does not support setting a future deactivation date.
  • The deactivation is effective immediately once the change project is scoped and activated.

 

Will prior data remain accessible?

All historical postings and transactions related to the deactivated sets of books will remain intact in the database.

You can still access and report on historical data from those sets of books.
No postings will be possible in those sets of books once deactivated.

 

What happens to master data (e.g., Fixed Assets)?

Fixed Assets that have valuation views linked to different sets of books will be impacted:

Once a set of books is deactivated, the valuation view related to that set of books will become inactive.
The asset will retain the historical depreciation and valuation information for reporting, but you cannot maintain or post new values in that view.
Only valuation views tied to active sets of books will be available for future depreciation or revaluation.

 

Cost Rate Master Data


For cost rate master data (e.g., for cost centers or activities):

Rates defined per set of books will no longer be editable or used in cost allocations once that set of books is deactivated.
The system will ignore those entries during future calculations.
Historical usage of those rates remains part of reporting for those past periods.

 

Service Master Data with Rate per Set of Books


Similarly, for services master data where rates are maintained per set of books:

Rates linked to a now-deactivated set of books will be ignored in future transactions.
Only the rates under active sets of books will be considered by the system.
The historical service transactions using those rates will remain in reporting and audit trails.

 

Can we hide non-active sets of books?


Not explicitly. While you cannot "hide" deactivated sets of books in all UIs:

They will no longer appear in selection lists for new postings or configurations.
However, they may still be visible in historical reports or master data where they were used previously (e.g., valuation views in assets).
There is currently no front-end setting to suppress them entirely from view in all contexts.

 

Best regards,
Pooja Manjunath
SAP Product Support | SAP Business ByDesign

entry.title: Re: SAP IBP – Automatically Copy Values Within the Same K...
entry.content:
Hi @KacperBenner,

your requirement can be solved by implementing a custom DP BOM capability. So in essence you create a relationship between product A and B via a BOM with ratio 1. Unfortunately the related documentation of this custom solution by SAP isn't avaible anymore. SAP removed it quite a while ago.
https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2586250

But anyways, the implementation of such kind of a solution looks like breaking a fly on a wheel.

BR, Peter

entry.title: Re: Unable to create delivery in public cloud
entry.content: The screen shot you shared is not clear to read but it seems, you were trying to create one delivery from multiple sales orders.  The error message says header data differs.  Did you go through that error message which is self-explanatory

entry.title: SAP Build Apps web preview stopped working suddenly
entry.content:
Hello SAP Comunitty,

I have been using SAP Build Apps for a couple of months now. But now I cannot open one of the projects I work on in the web preview. Last time I worked on it (2 days ago) it still worked. Now when I try to open it the preview dashboard just loads indefinitely. When I try to open it there is no activity in the developer console. Changing browser doesn't help.

Other projects open without a problem. Using an Old version of the Project where the Issue didnt exist yet didn't helped. 

I also tried opening the preview with a link from my browser history (which worked before) now only results in a white empty page.

SAP Build Apps

I'm afraid it doesn't exist any other workaround solution at this stage.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: Condition Type - Pricing Procedure
entry.content: Routine 601 is not a standard and some custom logic is added in that routine.  Take the help of your ABAP team to find out what validation is set and why it is not triggering

entry.title: Re: MB5K
entry.content: do we still need to contact the SAP hotliner? ty

entry.title: 🚀 Enquanto ainda não temos eventos locais, seguimos conectados ao SAP Business Campus em SP!
entry.content:
Nossa comunidade foi criada para fomentar conhecimento, networking e trocas de experiências sobre SAP em nossa região. Ainda estamos planejando nossos primeiros eventos locais, mas, enquanto isso, seguimos acompanhando o SAP Business Campus, que acontece em São Paulo, trazendo conteúdos relevantes sobre inovação, tecnologia e tendências do ecossistema SAP.

Fique ligado e participe das discussões por aqui! Em breve, esperamos trazer encontros e iniciativas presenciais para fortalecer ainda mais nossa comunidade. 💡

🔗 https://events.sap.com/br/business-campus-2025/pt/home 

#SAPCommunity #Networking #EventosSAP #SAPBusinessCampus

entry.title: Re: How to connect SAP Business by Design and SAP Datasph...
entry.content:
More detail to this query can be found in the Help documentation linked below:

Transferring Data from SAP Business ByDesign Systems Using ODP

entry.title: Re: Can't reschedule Exam
entry.content:
Hi @AleksandrShch 
You can cancel or reschedule an exam in Certification Hub by using the calendar icon in the
“Exam Appointments/Upcoming Appointments” section.
You must cancel or reschedule your exam at least 24 hours before the scheduled appointment date and time.
Our  Step-by-step guide - How to cancel your existing booking for a certification exam? might be helpful to you.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Validation on /OTX/PF01_UTIL_EXIT_REG_BEFORE while using VIM to creating MIRO
entry.content: Did you ever get a fix for this?  We are having issues with getting the line item data for Material pos to come over from validation into SAP Workplace for the item details on the po to match with Gr's done on PO's

entry.title: Re: Unable to create delivery in public cloud
entry.content:
Hello sir,

I have created a single sales order in which there are three-line items, at the time of delivery i can see only one line item instead of three, in error log it shows that there are some changes in header and item, but i have checked this there was no such mis match, before also i have created sales order with same data but it working properly.

entry.title: Re: Dudas generales de como empezar a estudiar SAP
entry.content:
Hi @carlos78 
Thank you for your understanding and taking action here. 
Others members may weigh-in with their own ideas for a solution if they understand the question.
I hope other experts or peers can chime in on the conversation now.
Regarding the edit function: Do you see option menu?

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: SAP Credit Management Limitation for Multi-Currency Customers
entry.content:
How to Assign more than one credit segment for the business partner (customer) to operate with different currencies?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP Credit Management Limitation for Multi-Currency C...
entry.content:
Use App Manage Credit Accounts to assign the business partner to more than one credit segments.

Also refer the same in SAP KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/3586101

entry.title: IP30 layout
entry.content:
In IP30 screen, some system have planning plant field, some system don't. I shared screenshots. Please let me know, how can I get planning plant field show the screen.

The system has 1909

The system has 2023 Hana.

entry.title: Re: Yard Logistics: Error while creating new business par...
entry.content:
Hi SandraBittner,

To be honest with you, I had the same issue 🙂 but I will try my best to explain you about that...

First the default driver role must be external number range, your case is ZYL_DR

System behaviour Steps :

Step 1. System used this below driver number range. Remember its hard coded in program...i dont know why. See the program screen shot

"SPRO > Yard Logistics > Master Data > Setting Up the Yard > Define Number Ranges for Yard Request, Yard Order, Yard Task > Define Number Ranges for Driver Business Partner".  Example-1 

Step 2. Then it add D with the number got from Step 1.

Now example D0000001 - As Driver id 

Step 3: Default Driver Role from below - External Number range since self check in app is generated BP/Driver as D...

4. Assign Driver to Carrier.

My Sandbox Example- New Driver id created while self-check in.

Please let us know if you have still questions...

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Re: My Partner Rewards App Retirement and Consolidation with SAP for Me!
entry.content:
Hi Aline @AG_CEE_NTT,

Sure, no problem. When the status is “Awaiting Partner Invoice,” it means that you are required to submit an invoice to your local Accounts Payable team in order to process the commission payment. If you need more information on this specific commission, I would recommend that you reach out with your Partner details to partner@sap.com

Kind regards,

Aine

entry.title: Re: Designing UI5 Apps as Business Solution for SAP Build Work Zone - Part 3
entry.content:
Hi @devbot ,

thank you for the nice feedback.
Unfortunately sharing across spaces is not that easy and would work the same way as sharing across sub accounts: You would need to convert this into a service with a service broker that allows to create a service instance in the other space / sub account.
This topic has not been covered by my blog yet.

Best regards
Matthias

entry.title: Deprecation of Basic Authentication - Onboarding 1.0
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a question regards to the Deprecation of the basic authentication that uses SuccessFactors usernames and passwords which will be in November 13, 2026. (The end of support date is May 16, 2025).

Our client currently has Onboarding 1.0 and is managing the replacement with Onboarding 2.0. However  we were searching for some impact to Onboarding 1.0. related to this deprecation in the mean time.

So will this deprecation involve also Onboarding 1.0? Which impact there will be?

Thank you!

SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding

SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding 1.0

SAP SuccessFactors Platform

Please contact your system administrator and provide the date and time you received the error and this Exception ID: 3774AA62. Click your browser's Back button to continue. Return to my original page

entry.title: Re: Enable Joule for on-prem ABAP Development
entry.content: I submitted a support case to SAP that references this post to find out if this is really the current situation. Everything about "3513374 - Generative Artificial Intelligence Software Development Kit for On-Premise release" makes it seem like we should be able to integrate our on-prem systems.

entry.title: Re: Users Cannot See Their Own Contingent Worker Profile...
entry.content:
Hi,

I’ve noticed that the Employment Switcher button is missing for all employees, not just for self-view.

Based on the SAP documentation, I’ve already enabled the following settings and permissions:

Manage Employee Central Settings:

  • Concurrent Employment Management
  • Global Assignment Management

Role-Based Permissions (RBP):

  • User Permissions - General User Permission - Company Info Access and User Search permission for the specified target population
  • Administrator Permissions - Manage Hires - Include Inactive Employees in the search permission
  • Field-level permission: User Permissions - Employee Central Effective Dated Entities - Job Information - Job Title
  • Field-level permission: User Permissions - Employee Central Effective Dated Entities - Job Information - Location


Still, Employment Switcher does not appear. Anything else to try comes to mind?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Approval Query for A/P Invoice Changes from Approved PO
entry.content: Hi, I think there is a misunderstanding. I need an approval query for an A/P Invoice, which should work as follows: If an A/P Invoice is created using the 'Copy To' function from an approved Purchase Order, and any data from the PO (such as unit price, document total, or quantity) is modified, the A/P Invoice should trigger the approval process.

Margit

entry.title: How to obtain a sql anywhere developer registration
entry.content: I have been trying to find how to register as a software developer and get a developer registration key for SQL Anywhere 16 or 17. The links are all old and point to the Sybase website which is no longer available. Please help 🙂

entry.title: IBP Automated outlier correction
entry.content:
Hello All,

Last year SAP had released the 'Automated Outlier Correction' functionality. Set up the algorithm and executed it. See results below, the higher values were corrected; however the values on the lower side were not. 

With the algorithm set up itself, I provided the source KF and the destination KF. 

Can you guide?

entry.title: Re: Query Regarding UTR Number Capture and Clearing Funct...
entry.content:
Hi @YashpalChauhan ,

I'm afraid I cannot answer all of your questions. However, I'd like to make you aware of the following two things that might be useful for you: 

  • Have you considered using the Map Format Data for Incoming Files from Banks app to create and change/adjust data mapping for file formats? For more information, see How to Create a Format Mapping and the related links at the bottom.

  • Instead of relying on the interpretation algorithms, have you considered working more with processing rules? You can use specific conditions and different processing instructions in processing rules in roder to process your bank statement items. For more information, see: Overview of All Predelivered Processing Instructions, and How to Create Processing Rules. 

I hope these resources help you.

Best regards,
Anita

entry.title: Re: Closing a large number of A/R invoices by a deposit t...
entry.content:
Hi,

SAP Business One was never meant to be used partially, and fixing this afterward is going to be very difficult. So my recommendation is to setup a completely new company (database) and transfer only all item and bp data. Make sure to setup the financials a scompletely as possible, and then use the stock taking / inventory counting transactions to get all item stock up to date.

If 80000 invoices is too many for the system to close at once, you can try and find out how many invoices you can close in one go, and divide up the 80000 invoices into chunks of that size.

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: SAP Buld Process Automation. Error: "Subscription Failed . "
entry.content:
I have a trial plan.

Subaccount: Azure/Singapor

CF is created.

Subscription Failed 

Couldn't subscribe to SAP Build Process Automation. Try again. If the problem persists, please post a question to SAP Community.

entry.title: Re: Approval Query for A/P Invoice Changes from Approved PO
entry.content:
Hello,

 

In this case, you can search the ADOC table. It logs the modifications in the Purchase Order. You will find the fields ObjType and DocEntry in this table that you can use to make the join with the OPOR table.

 

Hope it helps

entry.title: Re: RBPs Nightmare with Reporting
entry.content:
The field I was looking for, is not part of the  Global Job Informaton Section (odd because the Canvas report Query, shows that field is grabbed from there). 

Anyhow it seems this ID Field is being pulled from Biographical Info section. (despite the Canvas Report showing no indication of Biographical Information being involved in the report).

After adding it to the RBP, the field became visible.

entry.title: Where to maintain ISLM Connection mapping in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content: I was following multiple blogs to understand what is ISLM. There was a place where they were doing configuration in ISLM Connection mapping in SPRO. How to do that in S/4HANA Public Cloud version.

entry.title: Re: How to obtain a sql anywhere developer registration
entry.content:
Go to the SQL Anywhere Products page (SAP SQL Anywhere | RDBMS for IoT and Data-Intensive Apps) and locate the Download now link in the SAP SQL Anywhere, developer edition for free download section of that page.

Please ensure you review the license agreement which defines permitted uses for the Developer Edition.

entry.title: Why has the SAP ECL Viewer package size almost doubled?
entry.content:
I recently noticed that the SAP Engineering Control Center (ECL) Viewer package size has increased significantly. In the previous version, the installer was around 484 MB, but the latest version (ECL 13 SP02) is now 1.6 GB.

I would like to understand:

  • What changes or additional components caused this increase?
  • Has SAP added new features, dependencies, or language packs?
  • Are there any official release notes explaining the size difference?
  • Is there a way to customize the installation to reduce the size if certain features are not required?

I appreciate any insights from the community or SAP experts!

This sizing is ruining our deploy packages.
Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Report on Changes made to RBP Permission Roles
entry.content: Did you find a solution for this?

entry.title: Re: Account 64002000 requires an account assignment relev...
entry.content:
Dear user,

The message you get is due to a missing entry for the G/L account 64002000 in the default account assignment configuration that you can find in the SSCUI 102639.

CBC path :

I hope this will help you solve your problem.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Plan Delivery Time for Purchase requisition i...
entry.content: Yes, it will get triggered during the MRP run and it does not firm the PR.

entry.title: Re: Deprecation of Basic Authentication - Onboarding 1.0
entry.content: That is not a SAPUI5 question. Can you please review the tags?

entry.title: Re: Custom Code Migration (BTP): Object Navigation missing
entry.content:
Hi @Victorvk,  

I recommend using the note analyzer input file attached to SAP Note 2436688 - Recommended SAP Notes for Using S/4HANA Custom Code Checks in ATC or Custom Code Migration App to confirm that all recommended SAP Notes are implemented and current. If the issue persists, create a customer case in SAP for Me using the BC-DWB-CEX-CCM component.

Best Regards,
Greg

entry.title: Re: Issue Posting Service Invoice to SAP
entry.content: Hi Ankit, Thanks for your response. The issue has now been fixed—it was caused by the wrong trade type being picked up. Appreciate your support! Thanks, Urvish

entry.title: Re: Quantity Adjustment in SAP EWM using Process Codes
entry.content:
The suggestion works fine while trying to update a single Outbound Delivery, but when I try to write code to adjust quantity for multiple deliveries, only the first delivery gets updated. The rest don't. Followed the below sequence:

1. /SCWM/CL_TM=>SET_LGNUM.

2. DATA(lo_ref_sp) = NEW /scwm/cl_sp_prd_out( ).

3. lo_ref_sp->/SCDL/IF_SP1_ASPECT~SELECT( ).

4. lo_ref_sp->/SCDL/IF_SP1_ASPECT~UPDATE().

5.lo_ref_sp->/SCDL/IF_SP1_LOCKING~LOCK().

6. lo_ref_sp->/SCDL/IF_SP1_ACTION~EXECUTE().

7. lo_ref_sp->/SCDL/IF_SP1_TRANSACTION~SAVE().

entry.title: Re: Joule speaks ABAP!
entry.content:
@karl_kessler I can see this position in SAP Partner Pricing App, and we've met the prerequisites by using Pay-As-You-Go license for partners.

However, when I click Add service button in Manage My Services app, the "Cloud test, demo, and development for Joule for developers, ABAP AI capabilities" is not on the list of available licenses.

Is there any additional step required to be able to see it?

entry.title: Re: How to use Smart Link in Fiori Elements
entry.content:
I've created a test cds view to try this out in, but currently I have these components:

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZCSEMTEST'
@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true
@AbapCatalog.preserveKey: true
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Testing for semantics'
@OData.publish: true
define view zz1_c_SemanticTesting as select from I_SalesDocument
{
  @ui.lineItem: [{ position: 10, type: #STANDARD }]  
  @ui.identification: [{ position: 10 }]  
  @Consumption.semanticObject: 'SalesDocument'  // Enables SmartLink  
  @EndUserText.label: 'Testing 1'
  key SalesDocument as SalesDocument
}

SmartLink.view.xml:

<mvc:View controllerName ="semantic.testing.controller.SmartLink"
    xmlns:mvc="sap.ui.core.mvc" displayBlock="true"
    xmlns="sap.ui.comp.navpopover"
    xmlns:m="sap.m"
    >

    <SmartLink id="smartLink" text="{SalesDocument}"
        semanticObject="SalesDocument"
        additionalSemanticObjects="SalesContract, AccoutingDocument"
        enableAvailableActionsPersonalization="false"/>
</mvc:View>

 SmartLink.controller.js:

sap.ui.define([
    "sap/ui/core/mvc/Controller",
    "sap/ui/comp/navpopover/SemanticObjectController"
], function (Controller, SemanticObjectController) {
    "use strict";

    return Controller.extend("semantic.testing.controller.SmartLink", {
        onInit: function () {
            SemanticObjectController.destroyDistinctSemanticObjects();
        }
    });
});

 manifest.json:

"routes": [
    {
        "pattern": "MultipleSemantics",
        "name": "MultipleSemantics",
        "target": "MultipleSemantics"
    }
],
"targets": {
    "MultipleSemantics":{
        "viewType": "XML",
        "viewName": "dev.mirror.dev.view.MultipleSemantics",
        "viewId": "myTable"
    }
}

But in the preview of the app, my links remain unlinked:

Could you please advise me on what should be changed here? The links for the AccountingDocument apps and SalesContract apps do not show up.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One 10.0 FP2305 DIServer always gives "wrong user id and password" in log
entry.content:
I am in process of upgrade to FP2305. In the existing system, it gives session ID but in upgraded version it always give this response I call login request.

sCmd = @"<?xml version=""1.0"" encoding=""UTF-16""?>";

sCmd += @"<env:Envelope xmlns:env=""http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"">";

sCmd += @"<env:Body><dis:Login xmlns:dis=""http://www.sap.com/SBO/DIS"">";

sCmd += "<DatabaseServer>sap-sap</DatabaseServer>";

sCmd += "<DatabaseName>WILDIXEE</DatabaseName>";

sCmd += "<DatabaseType>dst_MSSQL2019</DatabaseType>";

sCmd += "<CompanyUsername>b1i</CompanyUsername>";

sCmd += "<CompanyPassword>*****</CompanyPassword>";

sCmd += "<Language>ln_English</Language>";

sCmd += "<LicenseServer>sap-sap:30000</LicenseServer>"; // ILTLVH25

sCmd += "</dis:Login></env:Body></env:Envelope>";

entry.title: Re: How to use Smart Link in Fiori Elements
entry.content: Hi Arun, thank you for your help and time! I tried doing what you instructed me to do, but it is not working. For some reason commenting does not allow my to format any code or etc., so I've posted an "answer" on this post with the relevant code that I've created so I can achieve the desired affect of having two semantic objects annotating my Sales Document field. Could you please take a look at it and advise on what needs to be changed? Thank you for your time and knowledge!

entry.title: Re block an order
entry.content:
Hi,

We use SAP S4 Hana. As credit controllers, we have to release the blocked orders. We use the tile "manage credit cases". I would like to ask if we can re block an order in case that we have released it by mistake.

Jerry

entry.title: Re: SAP Joule - Identity Provisioning - No assigned Roles displayed
entry.content:
Hi Tobias,

Here is my provision log. It updated groups along with users. The "group" is the key.

In this case, I'd suggest to open a ticket and let Support colleagues to analyze the issue.

Regards,

George

entry.title: Re: APIs for me.sap.com
entry.content:
Hi Joanna,

many thanks for your answer.

Milan

entry.title: SAP Ariba Procure to Order 2502 Release Key Innovations
entry.content:
Hello SAP Ariba Community, We're thrilled to unveil some great new features and innovations in our upcoming release, 2502. Our latest enhancements focus on elevating the buying experience, driving improved compliance, and automating core procure-to-order processes. Today, we'd like to shine a spotlight on the transformative updates to the item details page.

SAP Ariba Guided Buying capability - Revamped Item Details Page

With a laser focus on enhancing user experience for casual users, we've been hard at work refining the look and feel of the item details experience, ensuring that all buyers will benefit from increased visibility and a more intuitive interface. Here's what you can expect:

The redesigned item details page introduces a more responsive design, helping users find information quickly and easily.

Enhanced Header Section to now display a link to the supplier's detail page, multiple images of the item, and a more comprehensive overview:

Item details page

 

Favourites Management so users can now add and remove items from their favourites list directly from the item details page:

Advanced Pricing Information for Items with advanced pricing to now display detailed explanations for Price per Unit and Net Amount via a pop-up window:

Hazardous Material and Green Item Information is now included in the Product Information section:

 

Recently Viewed items to more easily browse through recently viewed items:

 

We have also expanded on the supplier information available, once you enable this feature, the 'About the supplier' section offers more extensive insights, including:

Diversity Information to align with your organization's sustainability and diversity targets by viewing attributes like "women-owned" or "locally sourced" supplier:

 

Supplier Status to gain insights from supplier management with status indicators like "Qualified" or "Preferred."

Additional Supplier Metadata to access address, main contact, risk, and diversity insights via a pop-up window:

 

These highlights are just a taste of the many improvements we've made to the item details page. For a comprehensive list of enhancements, please visit the corresponding SAP Ariba help page.

 

SAP Ariba Buying - Introducing Spend Consumption Reports

Based on your feedback, we're excited to introduce Spend Consumption Reports in our upcoming SAP Ariba Release 2502. These reports enhance your ability to track compliance and manage spend.

Find the new "Spend Consumption" folder under pre-packaged reports, containing two reports: PO Spend Report & Non-PO Invoice Report.

You can run these reports according to your preferred billing cycle either quarterly or yearly and can be enabled via the “EnableSpendConsumptionReports parameter”

 Gain better visibility, improve compliance, and optimize your procurement spend. Happy reporting!

 

SAP Ariba Buying - Price Validation for Requisition Import

Great news! Our latest release introduces price validation for requisition imports.

Now, imported requisitions automatically submit when line item prices are equal to or lower than catalog prices. If a price is higher, an error message appears, prompting users to review and update before submission. This enhancement ensures accurate pricing and smoother requisition processing

 

We can't wait for you to experience these exciting changes and look forward to your valuable feedback. Stay tuned for more exciting updates through the course of 2025.

  • Register for the Early Release Series for 2411 release
  • Feature related materials SAP Ariba Connect - Release Readiness (Customers except CIM)
  • Readiness Community page (For CIM customers)
  • SAP Community for Intelligent Spend Management page
  • SAP Help Portal pages - Procurement and Network
  • What’s New

Please check out the other blogs, and subscribe to the authors for latest updates aswell as the following resources on our YouTube channels:

  • SAP Products and Services YouTube channel - https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLWV533hWWvDk7zRbhOsWQkF5BGWokhHYH
  • "Spend Management and Business Network" playlist - https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLWV533hWWvDk7zRbhOsWQkF5BGWokhHYH&si=zTlYobcledkWNQ2M

entry.title: Re: Re block an order
entry.content: Can you add a tag for your version (on promise, cloud private or public)

entry.title: How to Trigger InvoiceRequest_Out
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I would like to understand how to trigger the standard SOAP (Proxy) service InvoiceRequest_Out in S/4HANA.

Service Reference: Customer Invoice - Send (B2B) - Customer Invoice - Send (B2B) | SAP Help Portal

Do I need to build a custom program to feed the data and call the proxy, or is there a standard way to trigger this service, similar to how we configure IDocs through Output Types?

I couldn’t find clear documentation on this.

I've already created the logical port in SOAMANAGER and set it as default, but that alone doesn’t trigger the message.

We are on S/4HANA Private Cloud - 2023 version.

Thanks,

Anuradha

entry.title: Re: BPC Reporting - Analysis for Office Versus EPM Add-In Detailed Feature Comparison
entry.content: All the images links are broken. I'm sure these are quite helpful. Can you please restore?

entry.title: Incorporate an RSS Feed Content Block in SAP Emarsys Email Campaign?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I'm currently exploring ways to enhance our email campaigns in SAP Emarsys by integrating dynamic content through RSS feeds. Specifically, I'm looking for guidance on how to set up and incorporate an RSS feed content block effectively within our email templates. Could anyone share insights or best practices on how to achieve this within the Emarsys platform?

Thank you in advance for your help!

Best regards,
Soner

entry.title: Re: Re block an order
entry.content: @raymond_giuseppi application version 1.84.39

entry.title: Re: Can't reschedule Exam
entry.content: I don't need to do anything with the old exam - I want to do a new one, but I can't.

entry.title: Re: 2 MDK controls on horizontal layout MDK
entry.content: MDK has the flexible column layout for tablets which was designed to support a list on the left with a larger area on the right for the detail.  However there isn't a restriction on what type of content is used in each area.  You could put form cells on the left with a table on the right.  Keep in mind that you cannot adjust the size of the left side versus the right side.

entry.title: Re: Joule speaks ABAP!
entry.content:
@Piotr-Kubisz 
Please be aware that TDD ABAP AI license (8019541) is modeled as an add-on to one of the following materials:

  • 8012331 | cloud test, demo, and development for S/4HANA Cloud PE, 1 System OR
  • 8017424 | cloud test, demo, and development for S/4HANA Cloud, 3 System OR
  • 8006364 | SCP ABAP, Runtime for Partners OR
  • 8006365 | SCP ABAP, Persistence for Partners OR
  • 8009282 | Pay-As-You-Go for SAP BTP for cloud test, demo, and development.

Here is an example for 8009282 | Pay-As-You-Go for SAP BTP for cloud test, demo, and development

Step1: Pick PAYG

 

Step2: Add ABAP AI

entry.title: Re: can someone help me with installing sapgui 8.0 on mac...
entry.content:
Go to https://me.sap.com/softwarecenter and download the SAP GUI for Java 

There are two versions, one for ARM and one for X86/64

https://me.sap.com/notes/3485691/E

entry.title: Variance problem with init in SAC
entry.content:
Hello
In the report I created in SAC, we have more than one Story Filter. There are also charts where I use variance. One of the story filters works as a single selection and we need to exclude a member in this filter. When I exclude a member in a single selection story filter, the variance does not work when first opened in view mode. When I change the year filter to all and select it as 2025 again, the variance also appears.

There is no change whether I select Previous Year or Previous Time Interval.

Has anyone encountered a similar error? Is it a product error or am I missing something? Thanks in advance for your help.

entry.title: Re: Joule speaks ABAP!
entry.content: Thanks Karl! That helped.

entry.title: Issue in time remaining(00:00:00) in bidders live auction cockpit
entry.content:
Issue in time remaining(00:00:00) in bidders live auction cockpit

We have observed the below issue some auctions during live auction with bidder Some bidders (2 out of 11) faced 00:00:00 time remaining issue in mid of reverse auction even auction status is still showing Active and there was still time remaining in live auction This is very critical issue and need solution.

Unable to reproduce scenario in development server.

entry.title: Re: Getting the name and values of a data structure
entry.content: Excellent!! Thanks for the explanation and sample code... Regards, Luis

entry.title: Re: Joule speaks ABAP!
entry.content:
@AlexanderRother  Thanks for sharing this, We have enabled this feature however in eclipse i get below error - 

 

ADT version is latest one .

entry.title: Re: Crossboarding process (internal hire process) should trigger from Recruitment Management Only
entry.content:
Hello @RajendraPrasadAllam ,

Thank you for this. Great article.

Quick question -> Let's say, a crossboarding process was triggered from RCM, the value for custom Field “Source System for Onboarding” in Job Information portlet was set as Recruiting.

I believe the value stays there in Job info. Then after few months, the crossboarding is triggered from EC, the value under employee profile for Source System for Onboarding in Job Information portlet is still Recruiting, then it means crossboarding will again get triggered from EC.

Thoughts?

Regards,

Akshay

entry.title: Re: FIFO SAP Public Cloud
entry.content: HI Melani did you mange to update COGS based on FIFO ?

entry.title: Re: Migration of On-Going Project
entry.content: Hi Venkatesh , Thanks for your reply . Source system is ECC on Premise & Target system is S4 Hana Private cloud . Please note that we can not connect these 2 system as the source system is owned by other company. Need to extract all open project data together with WBS element, networks , activity etc. from source system & create same in target system . Best Regards Mohammed

entry.title: BAPI Display for Material Document Using OOPS Interactive ALV by Double Click Event
entry.content:
Introduction 
 
In this Blog, I am going to explain Displaying BAPI for Material Document Tables (MKPF, MSEG) using OOPS Interactive ALV by Double Click Event. 
 
Here, I have done BAPI get detail for Material Document using BAPI_GOODSMVT_GETDETAIL using Double click event displaying Header table (MKPF) navigate to Item table (MSEG) in a same screen using oops interactive ALV. 

STEP – 1: Go to SE38 transaction code, Create Program, shown as below 

STEP - 2: Click on create a popup will be displayed as below, enter title description, type as Executable Program and Click on Save button. Then provide Package and request number. 

STEP – 3: Declare a deferred class future, and inside it declare all data declarations for tables, field catalogs and for grid & container. 

STEP – 4: Define Parameters for user input. 

STEP – 5: Define the local (handler) class – CL_EVENT. The event manager should have a BAPI_INTERACTIVE and a method for handling double click. Each method should be set to respond to an event (respectively: double_click ). 

CODE:  

"DEFINE A LOCAL(HANDLER) FOR CLASS - CL_EVENT. 
CLASS CL_EVENT DEFINITION. 
   PUBLIC SECTION. 
     " DEFINE A METHOD FOR HANDLE(EVENT) TO DOUBLE-CLICK EVENT.     " THIS METHOD SHOULD BE COMPATIBLE WITH THE EVENT SIGNATURE DOUBLE_CLICK OF CL_GUI_ALV_GRID.     " E_ROW IS THE PARAMETER THAT WILL RECEIVE THE ROW NUMBER THAT WAS DOUBLE-CLICKED. 
     METHODS: BAPI_INTERACTIVE FOR EVENT DOUBLE_CLICK 
                              OF CL_GUI_ALV_GRID IMPORTING E_ROW. 
ENDCLASS. 
CLASS CL_EVENT IMPLEMENTATION. 
 
  METHOD BAPI_INTERACTIVE. " METHOD HAS BEEN DEFINED 
 
    READ TABLE LT_HEADER INTO LS_HEADER INDEX E_ROW-INDEX. " E_ROW-INDEX IS SELECTED FOR PARTICULAR ROW. 
 
    CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_GOODSMVT_GETDETAIL' 
       EXPORTING 
         MATERIALDOCUMENT = P_MBLNR 
         MATDOCUMENTYEAR  = P_MJAHR 
       IMPORTING 
         GOODSMVT_HEADER  = LS_HEADER 
       TABLES 
         GOODSMVT_ITEMS   = LT_ITEMS 
         RETURN           = LT_RETURN. 
 
    PERFORM CONTAINER_2. " USED FOR TO DISPLAY CUSTOM CONTAINER 2. 
 
  ENDMETHOD. 
ENDCLASS. 

STEP – 6: Creating Layout for screen 100, first double clicks on Screen number 100 and click YES button in popup. 

STEP – 7: Enter Short Description & click on Layout. It will display Screen Painter  

Step-8: In Screen Painter click on custom container drag and drop on the screen and give the name for both containers by double click on containers then click on Save & Flow Logic, then check and activate as show in below- 

STEP – 9: In Flow Logic, uncomment both the PBO & PAI modules and double click on PBO module as show below- 

Click Yes button, it will show Popup click on Main screen as shown in below- 

STEP-10: Write code in PBO module for Screen 100 - 

Double click on STATUS and enter short text shown in above screenshot to add Function key i.e., BACK then click on activate and click back as shown below- 

Double click on Perform to display the first container as shown in below and click on yes button then select main screen and write code on perform- 

To call BAPI function click on Pattern -> enter BAPI_GOODSMVT_GETDETAIL in call method -> click enter.  

To create Object, click on Pattern -> select ABAP object pattern -> to create object select create object radio button enter instance & class name -> click enter. 

To display output, select call method -> enter instance, class & Method name (Set_Table_For_First_Display) as shown below- 

CODE:   

 *&---------------------------------------------------------------------* 
*&      Form  CONTAINER_1 
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------* FORM CONTAINER_1 . 
 
  "TO DISPLAY FIELDCATALOG 1 FIELDNAME WILL BE SAME AS BAPI FIELDS. 
   LT_FCAT = VALUE #(  

( COL_POS = 1 FIELDNAME = 'MAT_DOC' TABNAME = 'LT_HEADER' COLTEXT = 'Material Document Number'    ) 

( COL_POS = 2 FIELDNAME = 'DOC_YEAR'TABNAME = 'LT_HEADER' COLTEXT = 'Material Document Year'      ) 

( COL_POS = 3 FIELDNAME = 'TR_EV_TYPE' TABNAME = 'LT_HEADER' COLTEXT = 'Transaction/Event Type'   ) 

( COL_POS = 4 FIELDNAME = 'DOC_DATE'   TABNAME = 'LT_HEADER' COLTEXT = 'Document Date'            ) 

( COL_POS = 5 FIELDNAME = 'PSTNG_DATE' TABNAME = 'LT_HEADER' COLTEXT = 'Posting Date '            ) 

( COL_POS = 6 FIELDNAME = 'ENTRY_DATE' TABNAME = 'LT_HEADER' COLTEXT = 'Document Created On'      ) 

( COL_POS = 7 FIELDNAME = 'ENTRY_TIME' TABNAME = 'LT_HEADER' COLTEXT = 'Time of Entry'            ) 

( COL_POS = 8 FIELDNAME = 'USERNAME'   TABNAME = 'LT_HEADER' COLTEXT = 'User name'                ) ). 
 
  " BAPI FOR TO GET MATERIAL DOCUMENT HEADER DETAILS. 
   CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_GOODSMVT_GETDETAIL' 
     EXPORTING 
       MATERIALDOCUMENT = P_MBLNR 
       MATDOCUMENTYEAR  = P_MJAHR 
     IMPORTING 
       GOODSMVT_HEADER  = LS_HEADER 
     TABLES 
       GOODSMVT_ITEMS   = LT_ITEMS 
       RETURN           = LT_RETURN. 
 
  "APPEND TO MOVE DATA FROM WORK AREA TO INTERNAL TABLE. 
   APPEND LS_HEADER TO LT_HEADER. 
 
  "CREATE OBJECT FOR CONTAINER CLASS 1. 
   CREATE OBJECT OO_CONT 
     EXPORTING 
       CONTAINER_NAME = 'CONT'. "NAME WHICH IS GIVEN FOR 1ST CONTAINER IN LAYOUT. 
 
  "CREATE OBJECT FOR ALV_GRID 1. 
   CREATE OBJECT OO_GRID 
   EXPORTING 
     I_PARENT          = OO_CONT. "1ST CONTAINER OBJECT NAME. 
 
  "CALL METHOD FOR SET_TABLE_FOR_FIRST_DISPLAY USING CL_GUI_ALV_GRID CLASS FOR ALV_GRID 1 
   CALL METHOD OO_GRID->SET_TABLE_FOR_FIRST_DISPLAY 
     CHANGING 
       IT_OUTTAB                     = LT_HEADER "HEADER INTERNAL TABLE FOR 1ST GRID 
       IT_FIELDCATALOG               = LT_FCAT. 
 
 
  CREATE OBJECT OO_EVENT. 
 
  " BY USING SET HANDLER OBJECT WILL BE REGISTERED WITH METHOD FOR DISPLAYING ALV_GRID. 
   SET HANDLER OO_EVENT->BAPI_INTERACTIVE FOR OO_GRID. 
 
ENDFORM. 

STEP-11: Go to class implementation double click on perform to display container 2 as shown below - 

And write a code for container 2 - 

CODE : 

*&---------------------------------------------------------------------* 
*&      Form  CONTAINER_2 
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------* 
FORM CONTAINER_2 . 
 
   "TO DISPLAY FIELDCATALOG 2. 
   LT_FCAT1 = VALUE #(  

( COL_POS = 1 FIELDNAME = 'MAT_DOC'    TABNAME = 'LT_ITEMS' COLTEXT = 'Material Document Number' ) 

( COL_POS = 2 FIELDNAME = 'DOC_YEAR'   TABNAME = 'LT_ITEMS' COLTEXT = 'Material Document Year'   ) 

( COL_POS = 3 FIELDNAME = 'MATDOC_ITM' TABNAME = 'LT_ITEMS' COLTEXT = 'Item in Material Document') 

( COL_POS = 4 FIELDNAME = 'MATERIAL'   TABNAME = 'LT_ITEMS' COLTEXT = 'Material Number'          ) 

( COL_POS = 5 FIELDNAME = 'PLANT'      TABNAME = 'LT_ITEMS' COLTEXT = 'Plant'                    ) 

( COL_POS = 6 FIELDNAME = 'STGE_LOC'   TABNAME = 'LT_ITEMS' COLTEXT = 'Storage Location'         ) 

( COL_POS = 7 FIELDNAME = 'VENDOR'     TABNAME = 'LT_ITEMS' COLTEXT = 'Vendor Number'            ) 

( COL_POS = 8 FIELDNAME = 'CURRENCY'   TABNAME = 'LT_ITEMS' COLTEXT = 'Currency Key'             ) ). 
 
  " CLEAR CUSTOM CONTAINER CLASS 2 
   CLEAR OO_CONT1. 
 
  " IF CONTAINER 2 IS NULL THEN AFTER DOUBLE_CLICK IT WILL DISPLAY NEXT NEW RECORDS. 
   IF OO_CONT1 IS INITIAL AND  OO_GRID1 IS INITIAL. 
 
    "CREATE OBJECT FOR CONTAINER CLASS 1. 
     CREATE OBJECT OO_CONT1 
       EXPORTING 
         CONTAINER_NAME = 'CONT1'. 
 
    "CREATE OBJECT FOR ALV_GRID 1. 
     CREATE OBJECT OO_GRID1 
       EXPORTING 
         I_PARENT = OO_CONT1. 
 
    "CALL METHOD FOR SET_TABLE_FOR_FIRST_DISPLAY USING CL_GUI_ALV_GRID CLASS FOR ALV_GRID 1 
     CALL METHOD OO_GRID1->SET_TABLE_FOR_FIRST_DISPLAY 
       CHANGING 
         IT_OUTTAB       = LT_ITEMS 
         IT_FIELDCATALOG = LT_FCAT1. 
 
  ENDIF. 
 
ENDFORM. 

STEP – 12: Activate the code and again go to Screen 100 Flow logic, double click on PAI module.Click Yes button, it will show Popup click on Main screen as shown in below- 

STEP – 13:  Write code in PAI module for Screen 100 to leave program from the output - 

CODE:  

*&---------------------------------------------------------------------* 
*&      Module  USER_COMMAND_0100  INPUT 
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------* 
*       text 
*----------------------------------------------------------------------* 
MODULE USER_COMMAND_0100 INPUT. 
 
  CASE SY-UCOMM. 
     WHEN 'BACK'. 
       LEAVE PROGRAM. 
   ENDCASE. 
 
ENDMODULE. 

STEP-14: Save and activate the program and click on Display button input screen will be display as shown below- 

STEP-15: Enter the Document number & year and click on execute. It will Display Header details in Output Screen -  

STEP-16: When Double clicks on Material Doc number it will display Items Details in Right side of the screen as shown as- 

 

CODE:  

REPORT ZBAPI_MAT_DOC. 
TABLES: MKPF, 
         MSEG. 
" A DEFERRED CLASS IS A CLASS THAT HAS AT LEAST ONE DEFERRED FEATURE. 
"  A DEFERRED FEATURE PROVIDES A FEATURE SPECIFICATION, BUT NO IMPLEMENTATION. 
CLASS CL_EVENT DEFINITION DEFERRED. 
 
" DATA DECLARATION FOR BAPI. 
DATA: LT_HEADER TYPE TABLE OF BAPI2017_GM_HEAD_02, 
       LS_HEADER TYPE BAPI2017_GM_HEAD_02, 
       LT_ITEMS  TYPE TABLE OF BAPI2017_GM_ITEM_SHOW, 
       LT_RETURN TYPE TABLE OF BAPIRET2. 
 
" DATA DECLARATION FOR PARAMETERS IN ALV. 
DATA: LT_FCAT  TYPE LVC_T_FCAT, 
       LT_FCAT1 TYPE LVC_T_FCAT, 
       LS_ROW   TYPE LVC_S_ROW. 
 
" DATA DECLARATION FOR CLASSES TO DISPLAY IN ALV_GRID. 
DATA:OO_CONT  TYPE REF TO CL_GUI_CUSTOM_CONTAINER, "CUSTOM CONTAINER 1 
      OO_CONT1 TYPE REF TO CL_GUI_CUSTOM_CONTAINER, "CUSTOM CONTAINER 2 
      OO_GRID  TYPE REF TO CL_GUI_ALV_GRID, "ALV GRID 1 
      OO_GRID1 TYPE REF TO CL_GUI_ALV_GRID, "ALV GRID 2 
      OO_EVENT TYPE REF TO CL_EVENT. " EVENT CLASS FOR DEFFERED CLASS. 
 
"SELECTION SCREEN TO DISPLAY PARAMETERS VALUES. 
SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF BLOCK B1 WITH FRAME TITLE TEXT-000. 
PARAMETERS: P_MBLNR TYPE MKPF-MBLNR, 
             P_MJAHR TYPE MKPF-MJAHR. 
SELECTION-SCREEN END OF BLOCK B1. 
 
"DEFINE A LOCAL(HANDLER) FOR CLASS - CL_EVENT. 
CLASS CL_EVENT DEFINITION. 
   PUBLIC SECTION. 
     " DEFINE A METHOD FOR HANDLE(EVENT) TO DOUBLE-CLICK EVENT. 
     " THIS METHOD SHOULD BE COMPATIBLE WITH THE EVENT SIGNATURE DOUBLE_CLICK OF CL_GUI_ALV_GRID. 
     " E_ROW IS THE PARAMETER THAT WILL RECEIVE THE ROW NUMBER THAT WAS DOUBLE-CLICKED. 
     METHODS: BAPI_INTERACTIVE FOR EVENT DOUBLE_CLICK 
                              OF CL_GUI_ALV_GRID IMPORTING E_ROW. 
ENDCLASS. 
CLASS CL_EVENT IMPLEMENTATION. 
 
  METHOD BAPI_INTERACTIVE. " METHOD HAS BEEN DEFINED 
 
    READ TABLE LT_HEADER INTO LS_HEADER INDEX E_ROW-INDEX. " E_ROW-INDEX IS SELECTED FOR PARTICULAR ROW. 
 
" BAPI FOR TO GET MATERIAL DOCUMENT ITEMS DETAILS. 
     CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_GOODSMVT_GETDETAIL' 
       EXPORTING 
         MATERIALDOCUMENT = P_MBLNR 
         MATDOCUMENTYEAR  = P_MJAHR 
       IMPORTING 
         GOODSMVT_HEADER  = LS_HEADER 
       TABLES 
         GOODSMVT_ITEMS   = LT_ITEMS 
         RETURN           = LT_RETURN. 
 
    PERFORM CONTAINER_2. " USED FOR TO DISPLAY CUSTOM CONTAINER 2. 
 
  ENDMETHOD. 
ENDCLASS. 
 
START-OF-SELECTION. 
 
  CALL SCREEN 100. 
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------* 
*&      Module  STATUS_0100  OUTPUT 
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------* 
*       text 
*----------------------------------------------------------------------* 
MODULE STATUS_0100 OUTPUT. 
   SET PF-STATUS 'STATUS'. 
*  SET TITLEBAR 'xxx'. 
 
  "TO PERFORM 1ST CONTAINER . 
   PERFORM CONTAINER_1. 
 
ENDMODULE. 
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------* 
*&      Form  CONTAINER_1 
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------* 
FORM CONTAINER_1 . 
 
  "TO DISPLAY FIELDCATALOG 1 FIELDNAME WILL BE SAME AS BAPI FIELDS. 
   LT_FCAT = VALUE # (  

( COL_POS = 1 FIELDNAME = 'MAT_DOC'    TABNAME = 'LT_HEADER' COLTEXT = 'Material Document Number')  

( COL_POS = 2 FIELDNAME = 'DOC_YEAR'   TABNAME = 'LT_HEADER' COLTEXT = 'Material Document Year' ) 

( COL_POS = 3 FIELDNAME = 'TR_EV_TYPE' TABNAME = 'LT_HEADER' COLTEXT = 'Transaction/Event Type')  

( COL_POS = 4 FIELDNAME = 'DOC_DATE'   TABNAME = 'LT_HEADER' COLTEXT = 'Document Date')  

( COL_POS = 5 FIELDNAME = 'PSTNG_DATE' TABNAME = 'LT_HEADER' COLTEXT = 'Posting Date ') 

( COL_POS = 6 FIELDNAME = 'ENTRY_DATE' TABNAME = 'LT_HEADER' COLTEXT = 'Document Created On')  

( COL_POS = 7 FIELDNAME = 'ENTRY_TIME' TABNAME = 'LT_HEADER' COLTEXT = 'Time of Entry')( COL_POS = 8 FIELDNAME = 'USERNAME'   TABNAME = 'LT_HEADER' COLTEXT = 'User name') ). 
 
  " BAPI FOR TO GET MATERIAL DOCUMENT HEADER DETAILS. 
   CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_GOODSMVT_GETDETAIL' 
     EXPORTING 
       MATERIALDOCUMENT = P_MBLNR 
       MATDOCUMENTYEAR  = P_MJAHR 
     IMPORTING 
       GOODSMVT_HEADER  = LS_HEADER 
     TABLES 
       GOODSMVT_ITEMS   = LT_ITEMS 
       RETURN           = LT_RETURN. 
 
  "APPEND TO MOVE DATA FROM WORK AREA TO INTERNAL TABLE. 
   APPEND LS_HEADER TO LT_HEADER. 
 
  "CREATE OBJECT FOR CONTAINER CLASS 1. 
   CREATE OBJECT OO_CONT 
     EXPORTING 
     CONTAINER_NAME = 'CONT'. "NAME WHICH IS GIVEN FOR 1ST CONTAINER IN LAYOUT. 
 
  "CREATE OBJECT FOR ALV_GRID 1. 
   CREATE OBJECT OO_GRID 
   EXPORTING 
     I_PARENT          = OO_CONT. "1ST CONTAINER OBJECT NAME. 
 
  "CALL METHOD FOR SET_TABLE_FOR_FIRST_DISPLAY USING CL_GUI_ALV_GRID CLASS FOR ALV_GRID 1 
   CALL METHOD OO_GRID->SET_TABLE_FOR_FIRST_DISPLAY 
     CHANGING 
       IT_OUTTAB                     = LT_HEADER "HEADER INTERNAL TABLE FOR 1ST GRID 
       IT_FIELDCATALOG               = LT_FCAT. 
 
 
  CREATE OBJECT OO_EVENT. 
 
  " BY USING SET HANDLER OBJECT WILL BE REGISTERED WITH METHOD FOR DISPLAYING ALV_GRID. 
   SET HANDLER OO_EVENT->BAPI_INTERACTIVE FOR OO_GRID. 
 
ENDFORM. 
 
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------* 
*&      Form  CONTAINER_2 
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------* 
FORM CONTAINER_2 . 
 
   "TO DISPLAY FIELDCATALOG 2. 
   LT_FCAT1 = VALUE # (  

( COL_POS = 1 FIELDNAME = 'MAT_DOC'    TABNAME = 'LT_ITEMS' COLTEXT = 'Material Document Number')  

( COL_POS = 2 FIELDNAME = 'DOC_YEAR'   TABNAME = 'LT_ITEMS' COLTEXT = 'Material Document Year')  

( COL_POS = 3 FIELDNAME = 'MATDOC_ITM' TABNAME = 'LT_ITEMS' COLTEXT = 'Item in Material Document')  

( COL_POS = 4 FIELDNAME = 'MATERIAL'   TABNAME = 'LT_ITEMS' COLTEXT = 'Material Number')  

( COL_POS = 5 FIELDNAME = 'PLANT'      TABNAME = 'LT_ITEMS' COLTEXT = 'Plant') ( COL_POS = 6 FIELDNAME = 'STGE_LOC'   TABNAME = 'LT_ITEMS' COLTEXT = 'Storage Location')  

( COL_POS = 7 FIELDNAME = 'VENDOR'     TABNAME = 'LT_ITEMS' COLTEXT = 'Vendor Number')  

( COL_POS = 8 FIELDNAME = 'CURRENCY'   TABNAME = 'LT_ITEMS' COLTEXT = 'Currency Key') ). 
 
  " CLEAR CUSTOM CONTAINER CLASS 2 
   CLEAR OO_CONT1. 
 
  " IF CONTAINER 2 IS NULL THEN AFTER DOUBLE_CLICK IT WILL DISPLAY NEXT NEW RECORDS. 
   IF OO_CONT1 IS INITIAL AND  OO_GRID1 IS INITIAL. 
 
    "CREATE OBJECT FOR CONTAINER CLASS 1. 
     CREATE OBJECT OO_CONT1 
       EXPORTING 
         CONTAINER_NAME = 'CONT1'. 
 
    "CREATE OBJECT FOR ALV_GRID 1. 
     CREATE OBJECT OO_GRID1 
       EXPORTING 
         I_PARENT = OO_CONT1. 
 
    "CALL METHOD FOR SET_TABLE_FOR_FIRST_DISPLAY USING CL_GUI_ALV_GRID CLASS FOR ALV_GRID 1 
     CALL METHOD OO_GRID1->SET_TABLE_FOR_FIRST_DISPLAY 
       CHANGING 
         IT_OUTTAB       = LT_ITEMS 
         IT_FIELDCATALOG = LT_FCAT1. 
 
  ENDIF. 
 
ENDFORM. 
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------* 
*&      Module  USER_COMMAND_0100  INPUT 
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------* 
*       text 
*----------------------------------------------------------------------* 
MODULE USER_COMMAND_0100 INPUT. 
 
  CASE SY-UCOMM. 
     WHEN 'BACK'. 
       LEAVE PROGRAM. 
   ENDCASE. 
 
ENDMODULE.

entry.title: Re: How to copy all parameters between companies in one t...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition, there is no standard functionality that allows you to directly copy all settings from an existing company to a new one. However, it is possible to migrate certain data and configurations using specific tools such as the SAP S/4HANA Migration Cockpit.

The SAP S/4HANA Migration Cockpit is designed to facilitate the migration of data from existing systems to SAP S/4HANA Cloud. It supports various migration methods, including the use of staging tables or direct connections to existing SAP ERP systems.

It is important to note that some company-specific configurations may require manual adaptation in the new company, as not all configurations are automatically transferable via migration tools. Therefore, it is recommended to carefully plan the configuration process for the new company while taking into account your organization’s particularities.

For more details on using the SAP S/4HANA Migration Cockpit and best migration practices, you can refer to the official SAP documentation.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: How to remove decimals from chart on Y-axis
entry.content:
Hello Experts! 

Ihave create a CDS view and created a fiori app using Analytical List report. The service is an OData V2 and has been created using RAP. 
I would like my chart to only display whole numbers instead of decimals (se below picture Y-axis to the right). 

The code in my cds view for the chart:
@ui.chart: [{
title: 'Warehouse Tasks and Resources per Queue',
chartType: #COMBINATION_DUAL,
dimensions: [ 'WarehouseOrderQueue' ],
measures: [ 'NumberOfWarehouseTasks', 'CountResource' ],
measureAttributes: [{ measure: 'NumberOfWarehouseTasks', role: #AXIS_1 },
{ measure: 'CountResource', role: #AXIS_2 }],
dimensionAttributes: [{ dimension: 'WarehouseOrderQueue', role: #CATEGORY }],
description: 'Number of open Warehouse Tasks and resources per Warehouse Order Queue'

}]
The result in my fiori app:

How do I do this??

entry.title: Re: Using Custom Display Profile for SAP EWM RF screens
entry.content: Thank you for informative blog. Have a question, didnt you had to generate the ITS template for the newly generated Z functional group ? if so would you be able to explain how you did that.

entry.title: SAP Customer Data Cloud Console SAML Login
entry.content:
Hi All , 

I want to keep only the Console SAML Login URL active while disabling direct access to the SAP CDC Console URL.

Many Thanks,

Ruchita

entry.title: Re: Public Cloud - QM Notification - Assign task to Position resp. (partner function ST)
entry.content: I did looked on the Q&A already made I did not find information regarding the way to manage the organisational structure in SAP public cloud which could be use in QM Notifications.

entry.title: Re: Jaspersoft data adapter FSM connection issue
entry.content: Hi, Please use jaspersoft version 6.20.5, i use it since long without any issue.

entry.title: Re: Preview report translation error
entry.content: Values are coming from FSM and since those are not translated, only English values are shown.

entry.title: Re: Joule for Developers: Word Search Challenge
entry.content:
• The Joule for developers capability you found first

DATA MODEL GENERATION 

PROCESS GENERATION

And if I can think out-of-the-box, I would say just SAS (missing one A) Software as a service 😄

  • How you envision to use that capability and to what advantage 

I use AI daily in my development work. The main advantage I see is faster delivery. Our partners and customers can access more features more quickly. This represents a true digital transformation. 
I also noticed that more citizen developers can work on extensions more easily than ever before!

entry.title: Re: First look into SAP Datasphere's new version control functionality
entry.content: Great enhancement! Now let's look at something similar for data persistence. How great would it be if we could roll back to a prior persistence run?

entry.title: Cancel picking of EWM Production Material Request
entry.content:
Hi everyone

we're trying to find an efficient way to cancel pick of one or more items staged on a PMR.

As far as we know, SAP covers this reverse process only for the Outbound Delivery through the CANCPICK app but there is not such an efficient app for PMRs.

So we can cancel picks only following many separeted steps and using multiple apps:

1. release stock straight from the stock list of the desired PMR item
2. unpack item from the HU (app PACK)
3. Check the fixed bin for the item (app BINMAT)
4. Create a warehouse task to the fixed bin (app ADPROD)


Instead the CANCPICK lets us input the Outbound Delivery and offers handy functions to route each item back to its origin bin. Quick and reliable.

Can you suggest any other way to ease the activity ?

Thanks

entry.title: Error during installation of Plateau Report Designer (LMS custom reports)
entry.content:
Dear team,

we have been trying to install the PRD tool after installing Java and unfortunately we come accross the following error and we cannot continue:

 

Have you encountered this error before and do you know how we can overcome it?

Thank you and Kind regards,
Deyana

entry.title: Re: invoking Unbound action without param dialog in v4
entry.content: works with this. Thanks a lot

entry.title: (LMS) Requesting Observation - Regions
entry.content:
Hello Community Members,

I am seeking advice on an issue that we have with Request Observations in the new learning experience.

When employee opens request observers they see a list of Instructors and when they select my region it narrows down to region - AMER, EMEA, APAC

However, we would like to go down to the STATE level, as AMER region is very big and it doesn't make sense for our learners to be requesting observation from somebody on East coast when they are located in the state on West coast. 
When I raised this with SAP they said I can only create a post in innovation center with a suggestion for an improvement.
Is there anybody who was having similar issue? And what was your work around - to show to your learners which observer is in their state/location? 

Thank you for your time and advise.

entry.title: Re: TM: Basic Shippment How to set Execution Status Automatically?
entry.content: H

entry.title: Re: Missing transaction in document journal report with Transaction Code
entry.content: I had found lot of missing Serial numbers in All Transactions journals. what could be the reason for missing, and if it roll back, the entry number should be accepted again, from the last posted entry.

entry.title: J-GAAP requires our Japanese entity must transfer from Reconcile account to Reconcile account
entry.content:
We are preparing our system for our Japan entity to go-live in our production system. We are currently on SAP S4 HANA on-premise 1809 FPS 02, using SAP Fiori Launchpad. we do plan to upgrade to SAP S4 HANA on-premise 2023 within 2 years.

Our Japan entity has said, in accordance with Japanese standards (J-GAAP), they require to separate between Accounts receivable, Notes receivable, Electronically recorded monetary claims, Accounts receivable and Accounts payable. They must transfer from Reconcile account to Reconcile account per customer or vendor.

Currently we have only found the Park Journal Entries (F-65) will allow them to reclass AP and AR documents to other reconciliation accounts like they say they require to. We are concerned that we cannot restrict the users to only being able to use Park Journal Entries (F-65) for AP and AR documents.

I've hit a roadblock - I feel there must be a better app than Park Journal Entries (F-65) or a configuration to meet this J-GAAP requirement. 

What do other Japan companies, on SAP S4 HANA on-premise, use/do to meet this J-GAAP requirement?

 

@ChristineHorn

entry.title: Re: 🎉SAP Build Brings Generative AI to Process Automation to enable your Business Processes
entry.content:
Hi,

That's great to hear about the generative AI feature in SAP Build. Although I tried enabling this feature in SAP Build in my trial account still I am unable to see the option after I create a new business process workflow. Can you suggest any solution regarding this or any option which I need to enable in my BTP.

It should have appeared in the yellow marked area.

 

Although I have enabled the generative AI feature.

entry.title: Re: How to concatenate value in Global Variable
entry.content: Hi @pyae, do you have parallel processing activated? With parallel processing I think it cannot work. With sequential processing, you have to Create the property and read the global variable inside the splitter. If it not work, another option is to create add a join+gather at the end of the splitter and concatenate the invoice ids at the end of the iflow.

entry.title: Re: Delta Accrual Posting Zero Value
entry.content:
Hi @chirashamihwa,

It seems you have a configuration issue in Delta accrual settlement document type in your system.

Please keep check mark for the field "Summarize Debit/Credit in Posting Items" in your accrual document type accounting section and retry the Delta accrual posting.

entry.title: Unleash the Power of Agentic AI in Cloud ERP
entry.content:
Success in today’s business world depends on how quickly your operations can respond, adapt and evolve.  And many companies are looking to technology to make this possible. Especially in the form of cloud based, AI enabled business systems.

AI is revolutionizing the business landscape, and SAP is at the forefront, seamlessly integrating it into SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition. This infusion of AI is transforming processes, empowering teams, and unlocking unprecedented levels of speed, accuracy, and efficiency.

 Achieving Real Business Results with AI

A responsible approach to AI is built on core principles: 

  • Relevance – Drive efficiency with AI agents grounded in business context
  • Reliability - Understand the data that’s used to train models to uncover or mitigate issues like AI bias.
  • Responsibility – Deliver AI outputs based on the highest security and ethical standards

This ensures that AI delivers tangible business results while adhering to the highest ethical standards.

Agentic AI: The Next Evolution

AI agents are software applications that perform specialized roles and can collaborate across finance, supply chain, procurement, and other functions—using harmonized business data and process expertise to help teams streamline operations, optimize decisions, and unlock enterprise-wide efficiency.

The latest agentic AI capabilities are being embedded into key business processes, paving the way for AI-enabled operations to automate tasks, optimize workflows, and drive innovation.

Agentic AI can transform enterprise processes like dispute management, or supply chain management by working together to resolve issues quickly and efficiently, improving customer satisfaction and reducing costs.

Explore the Possibilities

AI is a truly revolutionary technology, and its potential business applications seem endless. However, it needs to be employed ethically and responsibly and deliver measurable value – and businesses can benefit greatly from starting their journey today.

Want to learn more about how agentic AI is coming to life?

Join experts and industry leaders for a focused session to explore:

  • How Nippon Gasses is leading the way in deploying SAP’s co-pilot Joule in its private cloud environment.
  • How relevant, reliable, and responsible AI is delivering real business results.
  • How AI agents can perform multi-step, cross-functional workflows to improve efficiency.
  • How to create custom AI use cases for your critical business processes.
  • How to plan and execute your unique AI journey.

Click here to register for Rise into the Future: Unleash the power of AI in your ERP today on Thursday March 27th .
